xml.sax.saxutils/unescape.name: unescape
xml.sax.saxutils/unescape.description: Unescape '&', '<', and '>' in a string of data. You can unescape other strings of data by passing a dictionary as the optional entities parameter. The keys and values must all be strings; each key will be replaced with its corresponding value. '&', '<', and '>' are always unescaped, even if entities is provided.
